projects.description: A hyper-local influencer campaign to drive foot traffic for a new Mediterranean restaurant launch.

caseStudy.problem: Launch the new location with maximum local buzz and ensure a fully booked opening week in a competitive market.
caseStudy.strategy: We identified and partnered with 15 high-engagement local food and lifestyle influencers for exclusive pre-launch tasting events, creating a 'fear of missing out' effect.

execution.title: Influencer Vetting
execution.content: Strict selection of creators with >80% local audience concentration and proven engagement in the dining niche.

execution.title: The Tasting Event
execution.content: Coordinated a multi-day exclusive tasting experience designed for high-quality content creation.

projects.description: Scaling brand awareness through a curated network of micro-influencers in the clean beauty space.

caseStudy.problem: A new clean beauty brand needed to break through the noise and drive direct-to-consumer sales without a massive celebrity budget.
caseStudy.strategy: Leveraged a network of 50+ micro-influencers (10k-50k followers) with high trust scores to create authentic 'Get Ready With Me' content.

execution.title: Community Building
execution.content: Focusing on creators who already used similar products to ensure genuine advocacy.

projects.description: A high-fashion digital campaign for the Autumn/Winter collection launch.

caseStudy.problem: Drive immediate sell-through of a limited seasonal collection while elevating brand prestige.
caseStudy.strategy: High-production creative direction paired with strategic Tier-1 fashion influencer partnerships and exclusive early-access windows.

execution.title: Creative Direction
execution.content: Developing a cinematic visual language that influencers could adapt to their own styles.
